历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 23896 → 23098 → 21690 → 27214 → 39518, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 21690 and 23896 from 2021 to 2023, jumped to 27214 in 2024, and further significantly dropped to 39518 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 17828 positions over the past two years, reflecting a significant change in the competitive landscape for this university among Henan Physics Category examinees. The 2025 ranking of 39518 serves as the latest baseline. The enrollment plan for Physics Category (including Science) in Henan from 2021 to 2025 was 244, 247, 249, 252, and 253 respectively, increasing slightly year by year; the 2026 plan substantially expands to 347, an increase of 94 compared to 2025, a growth of about 37.15%, the largest expansion in recent years, which theoretically could alleviate some competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the range of 84–92 in recent years (approximately 89th in 2026), placing it as an upper-middle level 211 institution, with a specialty in transportation engineering. In 2026 reputation data, no significant negative or positive events were observed for Chang'an University, with stable public opinion. The university's Douyin popularity ranks 83rd overall, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 277,000, indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms and no abnormal surge in application attention. No related gap records were found in historical admission anomaly records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chang'an University's Transportation Engineering was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, highly correlated with core enrollment majors such as Road, Bridge and River Crossing Engineering, Traffic Engineering, Transportation, and Vehicle Engineering, providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that engineering categories such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, aligning with Chang'an University's advantageous engineering majors. Civil Engineering and Architecture remain in a differentiated wait-and-see to clearly discouraged range. The total number of Henan examinees in 2025 was about 907,000 (352,000 History Category + 555,000 Physics Category), and in 2026 the total is about 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32%, intensifying overall competition. The History Category undergraduate batch line is 471 points. Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, a neighboring province, offering some regional appeal to Henan examinees. The university has a large enrollment scale in Henan (Physics Category consistently over 250 people), making it one of the main source provinces outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the inertia of the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the mitigating effect of the 37% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a 32% increase in Henan examinees, the expansion rate slightly exceeds the examinee growth rate. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be easier to enter, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 48126, within a range of 47626–48626.

Tier 1 majors (Engineering Experimental Classes, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science) can be targeted as stretch goals, while Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering and Architecture Class, Business Administration Class, Economics Class) serve as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., below 47626) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 4295 → 3958 → 3838 → 5676 → 5500, showing an overall trend of first rising, then falling, then stabilizing. Rankings improved from 4295 to 3838 (ranking number decreased) from 2021 to 2023, then dropped significantly to 5676 in 2024, and slightly recovered to 5500 in 2025, with the last two years in the 5500–5676 range. The 2025 ranking of 5500 is the latest baseline; enrollment plans for History Category in Henan from 2021 to 2025 were 17, 16, 14, 14, and 28 students respectively, with a major expansion to 28 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 27 students, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 3.57%, with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the 84–92 range in recent years (approximately 89th in 2026), placing it among upper-middle level 211 institutions. It is strong in science and engineering, with a small liberal arts enrollment. In 2026 reputation data, no significant negative or positive events were observed for Chang'an University, with stable public opinion. Its Douyin school popularity total ranking is 83rd, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 277,000, indicating moderate short video platform exposure and no abnormal surge in application interest. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, only Transportation Engineering received an A-, which is in engineering, and has no direct disciplinary evaluation relevance to History Category majors (Law, Journalism and Communication, English, Japanese, Public Administration, Architecture, etc.), but Architecture can be partially related to Landscape Architecture (not separately rated).

专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows Law is in a differentiation and wait-and-see range, Journalism and Communication is in a clear discouragement range, Chinese Language/Literature is in a recommendation range, and Foreign Languages are in a general wait-and-see range. In 2025, there were approximately 352,000 History Category examinees in Henan, estimated at about 466,000 in 2026, an increase of about 32%, intensifying competition. Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, a neighboring province, offering some regional appeal to Henan examinees. History Category enrollment is small (14–28 students annually) and stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the basic stability of the 2025 ranking, the slight 3.57% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the approximately 32% increase in Henan History Category examinees (intensifying competition, making admission harder), the predicted minimum ranking is about 5432, with a range of 4932–5932.
